description_long: This object is a classic, upright parking meter with a weathered, greenish metallic body and a rounded, dome-like top housing the meter display. The front features a clear window for viewing the meter's status, with a slot and possibly a knob or button below for user interaction. The body is mounted on a sturdy, cylindrical metal post that appears to be embedded into the ground for stability. The surface shows signs of oxidation and wear, giving it a patinated, aged appearance typical of outdoor urban fixtures. The sides are relatively flat with a protruding section at the top, likely for mechanical components. The overall design is utilitarian, built to withstand outdoor conditions and frequent public use.
description: A weathered, green metallic parking meter with a rounded top display and a sturdy cylindrical post, showing signs of age and outdoor exposure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the clear meter window, coin slot, and main user interface.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the meter head and the cylindrical mounting post.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the meter head and post, with no visible interface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the meter's profile and post.
attribute_payment_interface: A coin slot is visible on the front below the meter window; no card, contactless, or mobile app interfaces are visible.
attribute_coin_slot: Present on the front, rectangular slot below the meter window, slightly recessed.
attribute_mounting_post: A cylindrical metal post, dark gray in color, supports the meter and connects directly to the base of the main body.
